criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores like Google Play and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI features such as predictive analytics, chatbots, and personalized recommendations.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Security Features
criteria.description: Strength of security measures including encryption, multi-factor authentication, and data privacy policies.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, security audits, user reviews

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use, design aesthetics, and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, design awards, tech blogs

criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: Range and effectiveness of financial management features such as budgeting, investing, and expense tracking.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support services.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Introduction of new and unique features that enhance financial management.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app updates, user reviews
